description: A vulnerability was detected in itsourcecode Web-Based Internet Laboratory Management System 1.0. This affects an unknown function of the file /enrollment/controller.php. Performing a manipulation results in sql injection. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used.
